agentic_loop.campaign: prove-agentic-loop: end-to-end governed-run system proofs P1-P6 (Lutar.Agentic.Pipeline)
agentic_loop.ci_status: build (Lean kernel check) + lake build + numbers + check/doctrine + DCO all SUCCESS @ 2ede47a2. Mathlib-FREE module, excluded from v11 drift baseline via EXPERIMENTAL_SCOPES.
agentic_loop.headline: 28 new kernel-verified theorems, 1 declared axiom (hashFn_collision_resistant, P5 only). Proves a governed agentic run is auditable, gate-sound, and injection-resistant end-to-end.
agentic_loop.maturity_breakdown: 14 fully axiom-free; 10 Lean-core only (propext, Quot.sound); 4 axiom-gated (declared) on hashFn_collision_resistant (P5 only). 0 sorryAx.

P1_receipt_completeness.plain: Every step of a governed run leaves exactly one signed receipt; the log is append-only and gap-free -> an auditor can reconstruct the whole run.

P2_gate_soundness.plain: An action is allowed only if BOTH the policy check AND the kernel/doctrine check return ALLOW; a single failing check is absorbing and cannot be overridden downstream.

P3_non_interference.plain: HEADLINE: prompt-injection / poisoned retrieval provably cannot flip a DENY into an ALLOW. The untrusted context is recorded in the audit log yet quarantined from the decision (Goguen-Meseguer information-flow security).

P4_replay_determinism.plain: Re-running a recorded run from the same state reproduces a byte-identical receipt chain -> deterministic replay audit. Extends F1 from one step to the whole pipeline.

P5_tamper_evidence.plain: Any single-receipt payload tampering that doesn't recompute its hash makes chain re-verification reject -> forgery is detectable. Gated on the standard hash collision-resistance idealization (NIST FIPS 180-4).

P6_monotone_auditability.plain: An auditor who accepted the chain up to a point never has to retract that as the log grows -> streaming/incremental audit without re-checking history.

agentic_loop.ecosystem_use: P1-P6 underwrite the governed-run / signed-receipts story: P1 receipt completeness + P6 monotone auditability = the receipt chain; P2 gate-soundness = the policy + kernel deny path; P3 non-interference = injection-resistant tool calls; P4 = deterministic replay; P5 = tamper-evident receipts.
agentic_loop.locked_kernel: 749/14/163 @ c7c0ba17 UNCHANGED. locked_proven=5 UNCHANGED. Experimental scope (Lutar.Agentic.Pipeline, not imported into Lutar.lean).
citations: NIST FIPS PUB 180-4 (2015) Secure Hash Standard

capability_anatomy.note: a11oy is one governance substrate. The reasoning, policy and operator capabilities are INTERNAL a11oy functions (formerly separate services). No user-visible service split.

capabilities.title: Reasoning & Provenance
capabilities.plain: Grounded reasoning, memory/recall, and provenance over a signed knowledge base.
functions: grounded ask (cites its source, refuses to fabricate)
proof_support: Trust Score confidence interval from CONFORMAL (W5-3 + W7-4, proven) — distribution-free, with anti-overconfidence floor (never reports 100%)
Model Router stability C20 + PAC-Bayes/router envelope W7-5 (min<=average<=max)
Knowledge ontology label-invariance/expressivity: F-G2 (GNN<=1-WL ceiling), F-G4 (Lambda-graph iso-invariant), F-G6 (relabel-invariant functionals), W7-1 (degree-sum invariance)

capabilities.title: Policy & Compliance
capabilities.plain: Deny-by-default safety gates and full verdicts with signed receipts.
functions: full verdict (ALLOW/DENY) with signals + receipt hash
proof_support: Safety Gates = gate-soundness P2 (no action without BOTH the policy check AND the kernel/doctrine check; a single deny is absorbing)
agentic-loop P3 non-interference (untrusted/poisoned input provably cannot flip a DENY into an ALLOW)

capabilities.title: Operator (Ask / Act / Approvals)
capabilities.plain: Human-in-the-loop operator actions, each appended to a hash-chained, signed audit ring.
functions: multi-step governed workflow with per-hop receipts + trace id
recommendations from live health/quorum/Lambda probes only
proof_support: Governed run anatomy = P1 receipt completeness (exactly one receipt per step, append-only, gap-free)
P6 monotone auditability (accepted prefix never retracted)

capabilities.title: Receipts & Integrity
capabilities.plain: Signed, replayable, tamper-evident receipt chain for every governed decision.
functions: DSSE signed receipts (honest PLACEHOLDER when no key)
proof_support: Receipt encoding C8/C9; F1 (locked) replay determinism; F18 (locked) RS(10,6) recovery
Forgery detection W5-4 (a duplicate receipt is exactly a hash collision)
Audit envelope W5-5 + W7-6 (Doob two-sided: auditing early OR late can't change the result)
Merkle inclusion C13/C14 + agentic-loop P5 tamper-evidence — AXIOM-GATED on disclosed hash collision-resistance (NIST FIPS 180-4)
F-G5 bounded-frontier audit walk always finishes in bounded steps (edge hardware)

lambda_node.title: Trust aggregator (Λ)
lambda_node.plain: The 13-axis trust aggregate. Its UNIQUENESS is Conjecture 1 — NOT a theorem. A conditional/strengthened-class theorem (lambda_unique_under_block, under A6') is CI-green; unconditional uniqueness is FALSE.
lambda_node.stamp: Λ = Conjecture 1 (advisory, never a pass/fail oracle)

capability_anatomy.deprecation_note: Prior internal service names (amaru/sentra/rosie) are NOT user-visible. They map to the reasoning, policy, and operator capabilities above respectively.

tab_proof_bindings.note: Per-tab maturity-chipped proof bindings. Shared verbatim between a11oy and killinchu so counts/labels are identical. Plain language; no service names.

trust_score.copy: Distribution-free confidence interval. Anti-overconfidence floor: we never report 100%.
trust_score.honesty_flag: Sourced from CONFORMAL, NOT Hoeffding/PAC-Bayes (those are NOT proven at our Mathlib pin).

safety_gates.copy: No action without both the policy check and the kernel check; a single deny is absorbing.

model_router.copy: Routed cost is bracketed by component min/max — a router can't beat its best nor be worse than its worst.

signed_receipts.binding: C8/C9 encoding + W5-4 forgery + W5-5/W7-6 audit envelope + C13/C14 (axiom-gated)
signed_receipts.copy: Duplicate receipt = tampering; auditing early or late can't change the result. Tamper-evidence is axiom-gated on disclosed hash collision-resistance.

knowledge_ontology.copy: The knowledge/mesh-health functionals are independent of how nodes are labeled.

governed_decision.copy: signals -> forecast -> evidence -> recommendation -> signed receipt, with injection-resistant gates (P3).

lambda.copy: Λ uniqueness is Conjecture 1. Only a conditional/strengthened-class theorem is proven; unconditional uniqueness is FALSE.

deferred.reason: Required Mathlib modules absent at pinned v4.13.0 (HTTP 404). NOT proven; honestly deferred.

puriq_formulas.name: Replay-Hash Determinism
puriq_formulas.statement: Deterministic step-fold replay: equal logs replay to equal final state; folded state equals last of the explicit replay trace.

puriq_formulas.name: Scheduler Liveness
puriq_formulas.statement: Fair round-robin scheduler: every ready organ eventually ticks (strictly-decreasing Nat ranking measure reaches 0).

puriq_formulas.name: Organ Boot-Gate Soundness
puriq_formulas.statement: If the boot gate permits an organ, its genome is valid (decidable implication).

puriq_formulas.name: Receipt-Chain Acyclicity
puriq_formulas.statement: Appending the new largest-index node preserves DAG acyclicity (backward-edge invariant).

puriq_formulas.name: Unay Receipt Recall
puriq_formulas.statement: Insert-then-lookup on the same receipt key returns the inserted value (exact-key recall correctness).

puriq_formulas.name: LMDB Durability
puriq_formulas.statement: Commit-then-restart-then-read returns the committed value; uncommitted writes are lost on crash (WAL model).

puriq_formulas.name: Chaski FIFO Ordering
puriq_formulas.statement: Enqueue-batch-then-drain yields send order; head is the oldest message (true FIFO, no tautology).

puriq_formulas.name: Wallpa OSS-Only Safety
puriq_formulas.statement: Governed-voice admission gate admits only OSS sources; no humanClone or synthetic config is ever admitted.

puriq_formulas.name: Wasi-Rikuq Non-Interference
puriq_formulas.statement: Advisory non-interference (Goguen-Meseguer 1982): the low view is unchanged by high inputs.

puriq_formulas.name: Hatun MCP Idempotency
puriq_formulas.statement: MCP request normalizer is idempotent: normalizing twice equals normalizing once.

puriq_formulas.name: Ayni Reciprocity Conservation
puriq_formulas.statement: Event-sourcing replay invariant: balance reciprocity is conserved; tit-for-tat parity (Axelrod-Hamilton).

puriq_formulas.name: Kuramoto Phase-Coupling Boundedness
puriq_formulas.statement: Discrete additive coupling is bounded and superposes over an organ set. CAVEAT: additive fragment only, NOT nonlinear Kuramoto synchronisation.

puriq_formulas.name: Wayra Hash-Chain Verification
puriq_formulas.statement: Hash-chain verification is sound by induction: a verified chain has every link consistent.

puriq_formulas.name: Signature Verifiable Attribution
puriq_formulas.statement: A signature-envelope signature that verifies attributes the message to the key. AXIOM-GATED on declared `ecdsa_unforgeable`.

puriq_formulas.name: Rekor Merkle Inclusion
puriq_formulas.statement: Merkle inclusion checker is sound (structural). Binding form (equal roots => equal leaves) is AXIOM-GATED on declared `h2_collision_resistant`.

puriq_formulas.name: Safety-Gate Coverage Completeness
puriq_formulas.statement: Immune cross-cut completeness: 8 gates cover all 8 enumerated threats; gate set is exhaustive.

puriq_formulas.name: Three-Vertical Isolation
puriq_formulas.statement: The three verticals are pairwise disjoint (isolation by construction).

puriq_formulas.name: Reed-Solomon RS(10,6) Recovery
puriq_formulas.statement: RS(10,6) parity arithmetic: data is recoverable iff at least 6 of 10 shards survive (tolerates 4 erasures).

puriq_formulas.name: Bekenstein Entropy Budget
puriq_formulas.statement: Entropy budget is additive and monotone over a region partition; each region <= total. CAVEAT: additive scaffolding only, NOT the full Bekenstein bound S <= 2*pi*k*R*E/(hbar*c).

puriq_formulas.name: Mobile Input Equivalence
puriq_formulas.statement: Touch and pointer inputs are equivalent under the normalization map (decidable and sound).

puriq_formulas.name: Genome Validator Totality
puriq_formulas.statement: The genome validator is total over Fin 16: every organ validates.

puriq_formulas.name: Receipt Emit Monotonicity
puriq_formulas.statement: Emit appends to the sequence log with strictly increasing sequence numbers (monotone emit).

puriq_formulas.name: Lambda-Aggregator Uniqueness
puriq_formulas.statement: CONJECTURE 1 (NOT a theorem). Unconditional uniqueness is FALSE under A1-A5 (maxAgg counterexample). Conditional `lambda_unique_of_factors` IS proved; unconditional uniqueness closes only under declared axiom A6_bisymmetric.
